name: Tom Perez
subject: Let's get ready for the work ahead
body:
Help us keep fighting.
---
**Before our April deadline at midnight, pitch in $10 or more to help keep our resistance going strong.
**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c8ff/4067b0a/2f18eb574/7e7406ed/458006785/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170430_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170430_tp_v2s1&refcode=em_20170430_tp_v2s1")****
Friend --

Yesterday, we marked Donald Trump's hundredth day in office -- and, much more importantly 100 days of resistance.

>From the moment Donald Trump took office, you've been out there in the streets, on the phones, and online, fighting Donald Trump's radical vision and standing up for the values we share. Your resistance and resilience gives me hope for the future of our party and our country. When Democrats show up, we do big things.

[**So with the first 100 days of the Trump administration behind us, let's get ready for the work ahead.**](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c8ff/4067b0a/2f18eb574/7e7406eb/458006785/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+So+with+the+first+100+days+of+the+Trump+&utm_campaign=em_20170430_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170430_tp_v2s1&refcode=em_20170430_tp_v2s1")

We have a big congressional special election next month in Montana and a few weeks after that in Georgia. Republicans still have us on the verge of shutting down the government at the end of this week. And while we've fended it off twice already, you and I both know that the GOP's zombie Obamacare repeal bill will be back again.

Let's get to it. Before our monthly deadline at midnight tonight, pitch in $10 or whatever you can to make every day that Trump's in office a day of resistance.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c8ff/4067b0a/2f18eb574/7e7406e9/458006785/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/help-democrats-fight-back?express_lane=true&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170430_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170430_tp_v2s1&refcode=em_20170430_tp_v2s1")
[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c8ff/4067b0a/2f18eb574/7e7406f6/458006785/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/help-democrats-fight-back?express_lane=true&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170430_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170430_tp_v2s1&refcode=em_20170430_tp_v2s1")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c8ff/4067b0a/2f18eb574/7e7406f7/458006785/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/help-democrats-fight-back?express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170430_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170430_tp_v2s1&refcode=em_20170430_tp_v2s1")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c8ff/4067b0a/2f18eb574/7e7406f4/458006785/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/help-democrats-fight-back?express_lane=true&amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170430_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170430_tp_v2s1&refcode=em_20170430_tp_v2s1")
[QUICK DONATE: $200](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c8ff/4067b0a/2f18eb574/7e7406f5/458006785/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/help-democrats-fight-back?express_lane=true&amount=200&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+QUICK+DONATE+200&utm_campaign=em_20170430_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170430_tp_v2s1&refcode=em_20170430_tp_v2s1")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c8ff/4067b0a/2f18eb574/7e7406f2/458006785/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20170430_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170430_tp_v2s1&refcode=em_20170430_tp_v2s1")
** Thanks for everything,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c8ff/4067b0a/2f18eb574/7e7406fd/458006785/VEsHAg/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=17+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170430_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170430_tp_v2s1&refcode=em_20170430_tp_v2s1"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c8ff/4067b0a/2f18eb574/7e7406fa/458006785/VEsHDQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=18+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170430_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170430_tp_v2s1&refcode=em_20170430_tp_v2s1"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c8ff/4067b0a/2f18eb574/7e7406fb/458006785/VEsHDA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=19+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170430_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170430_tp_v2s1&refcode=em_20170430_tp_v2s1") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c8ff/4067b0a/2f18eb574/7e7406f8/458006785/VEsEBQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=20+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170430_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170430_tp_v2s1&refcode=em_20170430_tp_v2s1"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

Friend --

As we mark 100 days of Donald Trump's presidency, it's time to take stock of some campaign promises he's made:

**" I'm going to drain the swamp"?**
_Not with a cabinet full of billionaires and conflicts of interest._

**" Insurance for everybody"?**
_Trumpcare failed because it ripped away health care for millions._

**" Buy American and Hire American"?**
_Another unfulfilled promise to working people._

And why all the failed promises? That's because as soon as President Trump was elected, he made a deal with the hard right and wealthy special interest allies to let them run the show.

**President Trump 's made clear what promises he'll break to help the rich and powerful. Now it's our turn to show how the American people will hold their President accountable.**

[**Chip in $1 in honor of Trump 's first 100 days -- imagine his reaction when he sees thousands of donations made in his name to support Senate Democrats.**](https://secure.dscc. We've fought back each and every one of the GOP's dangerous policies, from their disastrous health care bill to President Trump's unconstitutional Muslim ban.

We've lit up Capitol switchboards, stood shoulder to shoulder at airports, and marched in droves to send a message of how many are opposing Republicans' extreme demands.

Standing together has given our resistance strength and momentum -- but if President Trump's first 100 days are any indicator, we can expect more fights on our hands soon that need us all engaged.

**So let 's mark Trump's 100 days with support for Senate Democrats who go to the mat for our values. Chip in $1 right now:**

[**http://dscc.org/100-days**](https://secure.dscc. Thank you,

Chuck

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Doubt
body:
#
Team --
I was first elected to public office almost 15 years ago and I know a little bit of something about people who doubt your abilities, who constantly remind you of what you can't do, and where you don't come from.
There were people almost 15 years ago who believed that I couldn't win an election because I didn't come from money or a famous family, that even though I was willing to work hard, that I would never have a chance. There are people who still believe that public office should be exclusive to those who come from great privilege, and that the rest of us just shouldn't even try.
And this is a problem that is bigger than any one campaign or candidate, because this is the kind of attitude that discourages our young people from trying, from believing in themselves, from breaking out of the cycle of poverty. This is the kind of attitude that keeps us stagnant.
This governor's race is about changing the face of Florida, but it's also about the opportunity to inspire hope and encouragement and inspiration for our young people. And that's why it's critical, as our campaign strategist Scott told you yesterday, that we leave no doubt.
**[Contribute to our campaign today, and help us rebuild Florida into a state with hope and opportunity for all.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3362/9e00690/483a182e/24034f5a/2447666360/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-april2017?refcode=Em20170429-doubt")**
We can do better in this state -- I firmly believe that -- but we can only do better if we're willing to work for it, to give it all we've got. I don't mind going anywhere and competing with everything that God has given me to compete with. I'm just hoping that includes you -- because I know that if we are all committed to doing better in this state together, then we will win.
**Together, we will leave no doubt.**
Bring it home,
Andrew

name: Tim Kaine
subject: never a more important time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
Derek,

I don't think there's ever been a more important time to serve in the U.S. Senate. Our country is facing unprecedented challenges, and **Democrats in the Senate are the only emergency brake on the train.**

Over the next four years, the Senate will play a major role in every issue Virginians care about, including health care, the environment, foreign affairs, and the economy. I want to keep fighting for you in the Senate -- but I'm going to need your help.

**My 2018 reelection will be a tough one, Derek.** Republicans are gearing up for a hard-fought race. They know this is their best chance in decades to get to a 60-seat supermajority. So we have to be ready, too.

**[Will you chip in whatever you can before tonight's midnight deadline to help me and Democrats keep standing up for Virginians and Americans?](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=V2ph6L9XLAGMW0VuCvxcHzCDEYc6I%2BmD)**

Thanks,
Tim

name: Tom Perez
subject: You impress me
body:
Help us keep fighting.
---
**Before our April deadline at midnight, pitch in $3 or more to help keep our resistance going strong.
**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cf09/4067b0a/2f0d8eff1/7e74ffc0/3544353206/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170430_tp2_nd&source=em_20170430_tp2_nd&refcode=em_20170430_tp2_nd")****
Friend --

It's easy to sit on the sidelines and talk about what other people should be doing. It's a whole lot harder to get yourself in the game.

That's something I learned well in my years as a public servant, and it's why I've been so impressed by everything I've seen as I've traveled around the country over the past few weeks.

Everywhere I go, I get to meet with hundreds or even thousands of Democrats like you who've gotten involved to resist Donald Trump and the GOP. You've got skin in the game, and that's not easy -- but it's unbelievably important.

I'm so grateful for your commitment and your strength. If we're going to take back this nation and get back on the right track, we're going to need every single person who shares our values in this fight, working together.

Thanks so much for everything you're doing,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

P.S. -- Because you've already made that commitment, I'm coming to you with one more request. Step up again and support Democrats in your community before our deadline at midnight. It's going to take all of us, together, to win.

name: Shailene Woodley, Our Revolution
subject: Thank Jeff Merkley for his 100 by 50 Act
body:
The bill not only would halt construction of Keystone XL, DAPL, and other fracked gas pipelines, but invest in the technology and jobs to rapidly advance us towards 100% clean, sustainable energy inde
#
Friends,
Over 200,000 people joined the People's Climate March yesterday in Washington. Activists from every community and walk of life joined together in a sit-in around the White House to demand that the Trump administration end our nation's reliance on the fossil fuels that are eroding our very way of life, especially in communities of color and low-income areas. We're seeing it happen with the Dakota Access Pipeline, Keystone XL, and other fossil fuel projects, and people have had enough.
We have an alternative to the backwards thinking of the Trump administration. Senator Jeff Merkley of Oregon has introduced the "100 by '50 Act" in the US Senate, and already has the support of Senators Bernie Sanders, Ed Markey, and Cory Booker. The bill not only would halt construction of Keystone XL, DAPL, and other fracked gas pipelines, but invest in the technology and jobs to rapidly advance us towards 100% clean, sustainable energy independence by 2050.
[**Sign our thank you card to Senator Merkley and his cosponsors, Senators Sanders, Markey, and Booker, for giving Americans the bold, clean energy alternative that we demanded during the People's Climate March.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d13/43f17890/db01721d/6203bc5c/1306516533/VEsH/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/thanks-merkley?source=em170430-full")
I spent time at the Oceti Sakowin camp at Standing Rock, and the ugly truth is that the fossil fuel industry will do anything to protect their profits. They will lie to the public, cheat the political process, and steal land from the Standing Rock Sioux and anyone else who stands in their way by violent means.
Their allies in Washington are many. The Secretary of Energy sits on the board of directors for the company constructing the Dakota Access Pipeline. The Secretary of State spent his career leading ExxonMobil. The head of the EPA made his career as a politician filing lawsuits against the agency he is now trying to dismantle from within.
[**We have to stand by _our_ allies in Washington. Jeff Merkley was the only US Senator to endorse Bernie during the presidential primary, and now he's working together with Bernie and others to guarantee 100% clean energy by 2050. Sign our thank you card today to show your support.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d13/43f17890/db01721d/6203bc5c/1306516533/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/thanks-merkley?source=em170430-full")
We **will** preserve this planet for my generation and those to come -- whether Donald Trump likes it or not. Thank you for taking action with me.
In solidarity,
Shailene Woodley
Board Member
Our Revolution

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: no deal!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __
Yesterday marked the 100th day of the Trump presidency, and I want to thank everyone who has joined together to stop him from turning back the clock in America. From the women's march to the climate march, and all the marches and grassroots actions around the country, people are working to take back the country we love.

Thanks to the outpouring of resistance from millions of our fellow Americans, Donald Trump has not been able to impose his destructive 100 day agenda on our country.

He wanted to destroy the Affordable Care Act -- we said: No Deal.

He tried to cut funding from lifesaving medical research to pay for his ineffective wall -- we said: No Deal.

And when he tried to impose a Muslim travel ban, the courts stopped him.

Make no mistake, Donald Trump and his billionaire cabinet will not give up easily. Next they are going to try to pass huge windfall tax breaks for the super rich and leave the rest of us to pay the bill.

[**So click here to join me a sending a message about the Trump tax plan: No Deal!**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91be0/70cdc2ba/4754f1c1/397f6a9/3145685646/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/sign-say-no-deal-to-trump-tax-plan?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+So+click+here+to+join+me+a+sending+a+mes&utm_campaign=em043017&source=em043017")

I would like to have a partner in the White House who is prepared to move the country forward, but all we have seen during the first 100 days is a president engaged in demagoguery and division. We should be lifting up the hopes of our nation, not preying on people's fears.

[**But I am confident that if we remain united, we can stop them. When it comes to retreating from our values, join me in sending a clear message that we will teach him the Art of No Deal. Click here.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91be0/70cdc2ba/4754f1c1/397f6a6/3145685646/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/sign-say-no-deal-to-trump-tax-plan?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+But+I+am+confident+that+if+we+remain+uni&utm_campaign=em043017&source=em043017")

Many thanks for fighting to take our country back!

Chris Van Hollen
